ogTitle: Stuart Park vs Sturt Plateau: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Stuart Park and Sturt Plateau.
heading: Stuart Park vs Sturt Plateau — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Stuart Park, Northern Territory and Sturt Plateau, Northern Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Stuart Park and Sturt Plateau have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Stuart Park or Sturt Plateau safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Stuart Park has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Sturt Plateau scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Stuart Park scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Sturt Plateau scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Stuart Park or Sturt Plateau?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Stuart Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
